howItWorks.intro: This crypto profit/loss calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: P/L
rules.explanation: Simple profit calculation with fee deduction.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.a: (Sell Price - Buy Price) × Quantity - Fees = Net Profit.

faq.q: Do I owe taxes on crypto gains?
faq.a: Yes, crypto gains are taxed as capital gains. Short-term gains are taxed as income.

howWeCalculate.intro: This crypto profit/loss calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
